title: thelypteris incisa
intro: Thelypteris incisa, also known as Japanese shield fern, is a species of fern in the family Thelypteridaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Thelypteris incisa include treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as having potential anti-cancer and cardiovascular protective effects. Thelypteris incisa can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or extracts for medicinal use, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
